rows.yaml:
collection: SOC Playbooks
playbooks:
  - name: FortiGate Block or Allow IP
    description: >
      Analyst enters an IP address and selects Block or Allow.
      On Block the IP is quarantine-blocked on FortiGate.
      On Allow a note is logged and the playbook ends.
    is_active: true
    steps:

      # ── Trigger ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: start
        name: Start
        next: Analyst IP Decision

      # ── Prompt analyst for IP + action ──────────────────────────────────
      - type: manual_input
        name: Analyst IP Decision
        arguments:
          title: "Block or Allow IP Address"
          description: >
            Enter the IP address you want to act on and choose an action.
            Selecting 'Block' will quarantine-block the IP on FortiGate.
            Selecting 'Allow' will log the decision and take no blocking action.
          inputs:
            - name: target_ip
              kind: ipv4                   # typed IPv4 field — validates format in UI
              label: "IP Address to Act On"
              required: true
            - name: action
              kind: select
              label: "Action"
              required: true
              options:
                - block
                - allow
        options:                           # step-level, NOT under arguments
          - display: Block
            primary: true
            next: Check Action
          - display: Allow
            next: Check Action

      # ── Route on analyst's input value ──────────────────────────────────
      # NOTE: Both buttons converge here so the decision inspects the
      # *field* value, not just which button was clicked.
      - type: decision
        name: Check Action
        conditions:
          - display: Block
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_IP_Decision.input.action == 'block' }}"
            next: Block IP on FortiGate
          - display: Allow
            default: true
            next: Log Allow Decision

      # ── Block path: Quarantine Based (no policy name required) ──────────
      - type: connector
        name: Block IP on FortiGate
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip             # canonical op name confirmed from connector store
          config: ''                      # uses default connector configuration
          params:
            method: Quarantine Based      # gating select — drives which params are active
            ip_addresses: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_IP_Decision.input.target_ip }}"
            time_to_live: "12 Hour"       # options: 1 Hour, 6 Hour, 12 Hour, 1 Day,
                                          #          6 Months, 1 Year, Never, Custom Time
        next: End Block

      # ── Allow path: just log a workflow variable ─────────────────────────
      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Allow Decision
        vars:
          allow_note: >-
            Analyst chose ALLOW for IP {{ vars.steps.Analyst_IP_Decision.input.target_ip }}.
            No blocking action taken.
        next: End Allow

      # ── Terminators ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: end
        name: End Block

      - type: end
        name: End Allow

final_verify_ready_to_push.detail: last verify did NOT return ready_to_push=True
